---
title: "Dingers Only"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(lubridate)
library(htmltools)

source("R/dingers.R")

season <- 2025
cat_choice <- "adj_xhr"

# Build leaderboards (this triggers fetch/cache via your functions)
lbs <- update_dingers("rosters_test.csv", season = season, top_n = 1000, cat = cat_choice)

rosters_joined <- readr::read_csv("rosters_test.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(player_id = as.integer(player_id)) %>%
  left_join(
    savant_hr(season, cat = cat_choice) %>% select(player_id, player, hr_total),
    by = "player_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    hr_total = tidyr::replace_na(as.integer(hr_total), 0L),
    player = dplyr::coalesce(player, player_roster)
  )

# Page render time (when the HTML was built)
last_updated <- with_tz(Sys.time(), "America/New_York")
last_updated_text <- format(last_updated, "%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p %Z")

# Data fetch time (cache mtime)
cache_file <- file.path("cache", paste0("savant_hr_", season, "_", cat_choice, "_Batter.csv"))
data_updated <- if (file.exists(cache_file)) file.info(cache_file)$mtime else Sys.time()
data_updated <- with_tz(data_updated, "America/New_York")
data_updated_text <- format(data_updated, "%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p %Z")

# ---- Dark theme you can reuse on every table ----
dingers_reactable_theme <- function() {
  reactableTheme(
    color = "#f0f0f0",
    backgroundColor = "#1e1e1e",
    borderColor = "#2c2c2c",
    stripedColor = "#242424",
    highlightColor = "#2a2a2a",
    cellPadding = "10px 12px",
    style = list(fontFamily = "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial"),
    headerStyle = list(
      background = "#2a2a2a",
      color = "#f0f0f0",
      borderColor = "#2c2c2c"
    ),
    tableStyle = list(borderRadius = "14px", overflow = "hidden")
  )
}

team_details_panel <- function(manager_name, rosters_joined, team_total) {
  team_players <- rosters_joined %>%
    filter(manager == manager_name) %>%
    arrange(desc(hr_total), player)
  
  htmltools::div(
    style = "padding: 12px 14px; background:#1a1a1a; border:1px solid #2c2c2c; border-radius: 12px;",
    htmltools::tags$div(
      style = "display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline; margin-bottom:10px;",
      htmltools::tags$div(style = "font-size:18px; font-weight:700;", manager_name),
      htmltools::tags$div(style = "color:#bdbdbd;", paste0("Total HR: ", team_total))
    ),
    reactable(
      team_players %>% select(player_id, player, hr_total),
      theme = dingers_reactable_theme(),
      compact = TRUE,
      bordered = FALSE,
      striped = TRUE,
      highlight = TRUE,
      pagination = FALSE,
      sortable = FALSE,
      columns = list(
        player_id = colDef(show = FALSE),
        player = colDef(
          name = "Player",
          minWidth = 220,
          cell = function(value, index) {
            id <- team_players$player_id[index]
            url <- savant_player_url(value, id)
            htmltools::tags$a(
              href = url,
              target = "_blank",
              style = "color:#9ecbff; text-decoration:none;",
              value
            )
          }
        ),
        hr_total = colDef(
          name = "HR",
          align = "center",
          format = colFormat(digits = 0),
          width = 90
        )
      )
    )
  )
}

####
safe_id <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(trimws(x))
  x <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "-", x)
  x <- gsub("(^-|-$)", "", x)
  x
}

manager_modal <- function(manager_name, rosters_joined) {
  mid <- paste0("mgr-", safe_id(manager_name))
  
  team_players <- rosters_joined %>%
    filter(manager == manager_name) %>%
    arrange(desc(hr_total), player)
  
  team_total <- sum(team_players$hr_total, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Mini reactable inside the modal
  roster_tbl <- reactable(
    team_players %>% select(player_id, player, hr_total),
    theme = dingers_reactable_theme(),
    compact = TRUE,
    bordered = TRUE,
    striped = TRUE,
    highlight = TRUE,
    pagination = FALSE,
    sortable = FALSE,
    columns = list(
      player_id = colDef(show = FALSE),
      player = colDef(
        name = "Player",
        minWidth = 220,
        cell = function(value, index) {
          id <- team_players$player_id[index]
          url <- savant_player_url(value, id)
          tags$a(
            href = url,
            target = "_blank",
            style = "color:#9ecbff; text-decoration:none;",
            value
          )
        }
      ),
      hr_total = colDef(name = "HR", align = "center", format = colFormat(digits = 0), width = 90)
    )
  )
  
  # Bootstrap modal markup
  tags$div(
    class = "modal fade",
    id = mid,
    tabindex = "-1",
    `aria-hidden` = "true",
    tags$div(
      class = "modal-dialog modal-lg modal-dialog-centered",
      tags$div(
        class = "modal-content",
        style = "background:#1a1a1a; border:1px solid #2c2c2c; border-radius: 14px;",
        tags$div(
          class = "modal-header",
          style = "border-bottom:1px solid #2c2c2c;",
          tags$div(
            tags$h5(class = "modal-title", style = "color:#f0f0f0; font-weight:700;", manager_name),
            tags$div(style = "color:#bdbdbd; margin-top:2px;", paste0("Total HR: ", team_total))
          ),
          tags$button(
            type = "button",
            class = "btn-close btn-close-white",
            `data-bs-dismiss` = "modal",
            `aria-label` = "Close"
          )
        ),
        tags$div(class = "modal-body", roster_tbl)
      )
    )
  )
}

team_table <- function(team_lb) {
  team_lb2 <- team_lb %>%
    mutate(modal_id = paste0("mgr-", safe_id(manager)))
  
  reactable(
    team_lb2,
    theme = dingers_reactable_theme(),
    defaultSorted = "total_hr",
    defaultSortOrder = "desc",
    striped = TRUE,
    highlight = TRUE,
    bordered = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      modal_id = colDef(show = FALSE),
      details = colDef(
        name = "Details",
        width = 110,
        align = "center",
        sortable = FALSE,
        cell = function(value, index) {
          mid <- paste0("#", team_lb2$modal_id[index])
          tags$button(
            type = "button",
            class = "details-btn",
            `data-bs-toggle` = "modal",
            `data-bs-target` = mid,
            "Details"
          )
        }
      ),
      rank = colDef(name = "Rank", align = "center", width = 80),
      manager = colDef(name = "Manager", minWidth = 160),
      total_hr = colDef(name = "Total HR", align = "center", format = colFormat(digits = 0))
    ),
    defaultColDef = colDef(minWidth = 100)
  )
}

player_table <- function(player_lb) {
  reactable(
    player_lb,
    theme = dingers_reactable_theme(),
    defaultSorted = "hr_total",
    defaultSortOrder = "desc",
    striped = TRUE,
    highlight = TRUE,
    bordered = TRUE,
    searchable = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      rank = colDef(name = "Rank", align = "center", width = 80),
      
      player_id = colDef(show = FALSE),  # keep for link building, hide from display
      
      player = colDef(
        name = "Player",
        minWidth = 240,
        cell = function(value, index) {
          id <- player_lb$player_id[index]
          url <- savant_player_url(value, id)
          htmltools::tags$a(
            href = url,
            target = "_blank",
            style = "color:#9ecbff; text-decoration:none;",
            value
          )
        }
      ),
      
      manager = colDef(name = "Manager", minWidth = 140),
      
      hr_total = colDef(
        name = "HR",
        align = "center",
        format = colFormat(digits = 0),
        defaultSortOrder = "desc"
      )
    )
  )
}


team_for_table <- lbs$team %>% mutate(details = "")

```

```{r}
htmltools::tags$div(
  class = "subtitle",
  htmltools::HTML(paste0(
    "<strong>Last updated (Site rendered):</strong> ", last_updated_text, "<br>",
    "<strong>Data last fetched (Savant cache):</strong> ", data_updated_text
  ))
)
```

# 🏆 Dingers Only Leaderboard 📈

```{r}
team_for_table <- lbs$team %>% mutate(details = "")
team_table(team_for_table)
```

```{r}
modals <- lapply(unique(rosters_joined$manager), manager_modal, rosters_joined = rosters_joined)
htmltools::tagList(modals)
```

---

# ☄️ Player Homerun Leaderboard 📈

```{r}
player_table(lbs$players)
```

---

Data Provided by [Baseball Savant](https://baseballsavant.mlb.com/)
